metadata.description: CogMap — an LLM-in-the-loop, Minard-style knowledge-base visualization built from your reading notes.

plugins.name: cogmap-knowledge-base
plugins.description: Refresh and rebuild the CogMap Minard-style knowledge-base visualization from reading notes. Incremental, LLM-in-the-loop (no API key): only changed notes are re-extracted, only new concepts re-clustered, only a moved graph re-synthesized.
